headline: Is Union Pacific (UNP) Still Attractive After A 21% One Year Share Price Gain
summary: Wondering if Union Pacific at around US$262 per share still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price? This article walks through the key numbers so you can judge how the stock stacks up against its underlying fundamentals. Over shorter periods the stock has been fairly muted, with the share price down 1.2% over the last week and down 0.8% over the last month. For longer horizons, returns of 13.3% year to date, 21.2% over 1 year, 41.4% over 3 years and...
